title: cyclosorus bewaniensis
intro: Cyclosorus bewaniensis, also known as the Bewani Cyclosorus, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae, characterized by its delicate fronds and distinctive leaf morphology. Traditionally, the plant is used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus bewaniensis include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, which are used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other health issues.
